codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, the available transcript skeleton for worker session `0fd5cedc-b8e3-4ee8-927d-e06b556e0659`, and commit `e17fae9f19ef9a8973224efb5680de92a298e6cb`. The implementation adds narrow real-fixture instrumentation flows that exercise the shipped app shell for VAL-SNIPPET-008 through VAL-SNIPPET-012, and the `SshSessionCoordinator` input-write mutex is a minimal, well-scoped product change that prevents concurrent stdin writes from byte-interleaving during live-session proof. I did not find any high-confidence correctness issues in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature metadata retains an earlier worker session ID without a matching handoff or transcript skeleton artifact, which makes the feature audit trail incomplete for reviewers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/root/.factory/missions/91fdc83e-53cf-4a4e-94a9-0be6de23fe64/features.json` lists worker sessions `272803b2-8f35-40ba-94b7-d6cbfe915fc7` and `0fd5cedc-b8e3-4ee8-927d-e06b556e0659` for this feature, but `/root/.factory/missions/91fdc83e-53cf-4a4e-94a9-0be6de23fe64/handoffs` only contains a handoff for `0fd5cedc-b8e3-4ee8-927d-e06b556e0659`, and `/root/.factory/missions/91fdc83e-53cf-4a4e-94a9-0be6de23fe64/worker-transcripts.jsonl` has no entry for `272803b2-8f35-40ba-94b7-d6cbfe915fc7`.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature diff, the last worker handoff, the available transcript skeleton, mission guidance, architecture, and the SSH-terminal worker skill. The dispatch-side snippet proof work appears complete for VAL-SNIPPET-008 through VAL-SNIPPET-012, and I found no high-confidence code defects in the committed implementation.
